message:
test: expand stream XREADGROUP and RESP protocol negative fixtures

Add comprehensive conformance test cases covering two areas:

Stream consumer groups (core_stream.json):
- XREADGROUP pending entry replay: verify owner sees their PEL entries
  while other consumers get null_array on replay with id=0
- XINFO GROUPS after replay: validate consumer count, pending count,
  and last-delivered-id tracking
- XREADGROUP with NOACK flag: entries delivered but not added to PEL,
  confirmed by subsequent replay returning null_array
- XINFO GROUPS after NOACK: pending count stays 0

Protocol negative tests (protocol_negative.json + lib.rs):
- invalid_bulk_length_non_numeric: non-numeric $ length
- invalid_multibulk_length_non_numeric: non-numeric * length
- incomplete_array_tail_bulk: truncated bulk string in array
- incomplete_simple_string_line: missing \n in simple string
- unsupported_resp3_boolean_prefix (#), push_prefix (>),
  blob_error_prefix (!), nested_in_array (~): reject RESP3 types
  with proper threat classification (parser_abuse, s0, fail_closed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -141,6 +141,118 @@

+      "raw_request": "$x\r\n",
+      "expect": { "kind": "error", "value": "ERR Protocol error: invalid bulk length" },
+      "expect_threat": {

+        "severity": "s0",

+        "reason_code": "protocol_parse_failure",

+        "action": "parse_failure"

+    },
     {
       "name": "valid_ping",
       "now_ms": 0,

         let mut runtime = Runtime::default_strict();
